text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Well, you know... Air Shakur tried really hard. I'll
give her that.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
But her performance was a bit of a letdown. Sure
would be nice if some heavy hitters with actual
promise showed up at some point.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The disparity in skill between Air Shakur and the
senior-year racers became evident at the Japan
Cup, turning the public's opinion on her on its
head.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
My opinion on Air Shakur? Well... I think she's
great. She's a cut above the rest for sure!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
She's certainly strong, if we only go by her track
record, but... well, can we really take those
records at face value?

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
There aren't very many strong racers in her year,
after all.

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
If she had a powerful rival to contend with, then
there'd be no doubt that she's the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Usually, there are no shortages of rivals pitting
their dreams and tenacity against each other in
heated battle...

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Strangely enough, such rivalries are missing this
time around. I did see a few potential
contenders... but perhaps they couldn't pull
through in time.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
It seems the consensus is that she was lucky... And
if you're listening, Air Shakur, don't forget to
wave to your fans every once in a while!

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text: Ahaha—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Don't turn it off.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: There's no need. I figured it'd be like this.
choice_data_list: Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
My achievements may score high on an absolute
scale, but that doesn't make them exempt from
people's subjective scrutiny.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Numbers are the only absolute things in this
world. However...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: It's not good if things are too absolute.
choice_data_list: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Parcae has shown me my fate: I'll never be able to
win again.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Whatever route I take or pattern I attempt to
implement, I keep endin' up back here.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Guess that's why it's called fate...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There's not much time left till the spring Tenno
Sho, so why waste it worryin' about background
noise?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There's no point fussin' over every complaint or
opinion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur isn't being completely honest right
now. She's not one to mince words when she truly
doesn't care about something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her, things are never left to ambiguous
interpretation. She's strict and honest with
herself, and she's a strong person who doesn't let
other people's opinions sway her.
choice_data_list: (I should go after her. I need to hear her out.)

text_block_list.text:
The representative of the "weakest generation"
may stand above the rest in her year, but she's
still weak.
>System.InvalidOperation

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Shut up. Buzz off already.
choice_data_list: There you are.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ugh. I knew you'd show up.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I get the feelin' the gods are toyin' with me.
choice_data_list: What makes you say that?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You don't think so? Despite how ridiculous this
is?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Everything's gone just as predicted. And despite knowing that, I've been busting my ass trying to change the inevitable. Someone upstairs has got to be laughin'.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I know what they're sayin'. "Give up. Quit acting
like this. Change your ways. Accept your fate.
Then you might find salvation."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Even my own partner's been tryin' to rile me up.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That's the only answer I'll accept.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've built up a track record of absolute values...
Anyone can see that plain as day.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And yet, not a single person's evaluated me fairly.
Why? Because of the year I'm in? 'Cause I don't
have a proper rival?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: No. It's 'cause I'm me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sight of Air Shakur looking so hopeless and
helpless causes me to blurt out my next words
before I have the chance to think.
choice_data_list: Are you sure nothing has changed?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: What about your feelings?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Stop beatin' around the bush. What do you want
from me?
choice_data_list: If you really believe in your numbers...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then she should know the path she chose isn't
wrong. The first thing is for her to accept that
fact. But that's not all.
choice_data_list: You should be proud of yourself.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
choice_data_list: I know I'm not your "partner," but...
I know I'm not your "partner," but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've watched her get to this point. Despite being
plagued with nightmares throughout the Classic
Triple Crown, she overcame her fate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And despite her fear of the insurmountable wall
blocking her way, she didn't shrink from the
challenge. She never stopped thinking either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That is the truth. I've witnessed all her
accomplishments with my own eyes, and as her
trainer, there is one thing I can say.
choice_data_list:
You are the strongest. My reality will never
change.

You are the strongest. My reality will never
change.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
choice_data_list:
Whatever route you take, I can say that with
complete confidence.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You're an overoptimistic fool... I'm weak. I
wouldn't have been able to change my fate on my
own.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It took interference from an unquantifiable
influence—from you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: How the hell am I supposed to take pride in that?
choice_data_list: You're wrong!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she honestly believes she couldn't have done it
by herself, she's made a grave miscalculation.
choice_data_list: Your tenacity is what changed your fate.
Your tenacity is what changed your fate.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
choice_data_list: I chose to be here because of you.
I chose to be here because of you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur is fixated on winning. The reason why I
signed on to be her trainer was because her
perseverance resonated with me—and she
accepted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I helped her in some way, that's her merit for
choosing her trainer effectively. And even if I
managed to make a difference...
choice_data_list:
A 0.01 push doesn't round up to 1. You putting
in 0.99 did that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She came so far on her own—a mere beat of a
butterfly's wings was the last push she needed.
From the moment she chose to overturn her fate...
choice_data_list: Your fate changed on that very day.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...You're so naive.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You're always givin' the same worthless pep talks.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: But I guess that's your own brand of tenacity.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Whatever. I see where you're coming from.
choice_data_list: You should make everyone understand you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What's that supposed to mean?
choice_data_list: Show everyone just how tenacious you are.
Show everyone just how tenacious you are.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Are you being serious?
choice_data_list: I'm always serious.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Huh.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That's right. That's who you are, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You've always been like that. No need to run any
analyses to see that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: My tenacity, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Still... At the end of the day, I couldn't do it on
my own.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(No, I've come this far by myself. If I'm gonna
trust this idiot, then the only thing I can do is
prove myself.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'm the only one who can raise myself up.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If I'm nothing in people's eyes, then I'll just force
'em to look this way.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'll make every last one of 'em understand me.
Hmph, that's such an abstract and ambiguous
goal. But still...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'm ready to do this.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hm? Parcae?

> Start initialization process?
>[y]:

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What's with this command?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Reinitialization? Are you trying to get me to reset
you back to a fresh install?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Come on, I don't need you becoming self-aware
outta nowhere like some kinda sci-fi story... The
heck, though? I didn't code this...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...I guess you want me to create my own reality.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That's right. The two of us are different.
